raw_response: {"current_life_events":"She is in the middle of her final exams, having spent the last two nights staring at anatomy charts and struggling to stay awake. The sudden loss of her best friend in a car accident last week has left her emotionally raw, and she has not been able to focus on studying or even walk to the library without a tear. She also has a research assistant shift scheduled for tomorrow, adding another layer of responsibility she feels she must keep up with.","mental_state":"Grief and exhaustion are overwhelming her; she is doubting whether she can finish her exams and keep up with her work responsibilities.","mood":"overwhelmed and grieving","emotions":["grief","anxious","fatigued","isolated"],"resistance_cooperation_level":"medium","currently_active_problems":["grief_of_loved_one","academic_pressure","sleep_problems"],"why_bringing_these_up_now":"The combination of final‑exam pressure and the recent loss of her best friend has made grief and sleep disruption the most pressing issues for her today, prompting her to seek support."}

parsed.current_life_events: She is in the middle of her final exams, having spent the last two nights staring at anatomy charts and struggling to stay awake. The sudden loss of her best friend in a car accident last week has left her emotionally raw, and she has not been able to focus on studying or even walk to the library without a tear. She also has a research assistant shift scheduled for tomorrow, adding another layer of responsibility she feels she must keep up with.
parsed.mental_state: Grief and exhaustion are overwhelming her; she is doubting whether she can finish her exams and keep up with her work responsibilities.
parsed.why_bringing_these_up_now: The combination of final‑exam pressure and the recent loss of her best friend has made grief and sleep disruption the most pressing issues for her today, prompting her to seek support.
